creator: tg@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported, thanks. Two changes: 

1. I moved the port to the x11 category, that's where all the other 
desktop managers for X seem to live. 
2. I installed the pixmaps into ${PREFIX}include/X11/pixmaps. We already 
have a number of ports which put their pixmaps there.
